LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALYCE CRAFT'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT, (SFLR 8.10) AND CONTINUED TO JULY 21, 2014 AT 9:30 AM TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6C. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 19, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING, OPPOSITION, AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ALYCE CRAFT'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. MOTION IS OTHER WISE DENIED. ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAPH 56 AND 57 ARE NOT IMPROPER; WHETHER PLAINTIFF HAD TO COMPLY WITH OR WAS EXCUSED FROM THE CONTRACT PROVISIONS REGARDING EXERCISE OF THE OPTION TO RENEW AFTER DEFENDANT'S BREACH OF CONTRACT, IS AN ISSUE THAT CANNOT BE PROPERLY ADDRESSED AT THIS STAGE OF LITIGATION ON A MOTION TO STRIKE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ALYCE CRAFT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to the causes of action for fraud and negligent misrepresentation per Hunter v. Upright (1993) 6 Cal.4th 1174, Lazar v. Superior Court (1996) 12 Cal.4th 631, and Robinson Helicopter v. Dana Corporation (2004) 34 Cal.4th 979, as Plaintiff cannot plead detrimental reliance and damages separate and apart from damages caused by the breach of contract. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ALYCE CRAFT'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for punitive damages. Motion is other wise denied. Allegations in paragraph 56 and 57 are not improper; whether plaintiff had to comply with or was excused from the contract provisions regarding exercise of the option to renew after defendant's breach of contract, is an issue that cannot be properly addressed at this stage of litigation on a motion to strike. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported.
